facts: NIT Srinagar (National Institute of Technology Srinagar) is located at Hazratbal, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, 190006.
Climate: Winter (December-February), Spring (March-April), Summer (May-August), Rainy (June-August), Autumn (September-November).
Only postpaid SIM works at NIT Srinagar. Prepaid SIMs do not work. 5G and 4G connectivity available.
Srinagar Railway Station is 17 km from NIT Srinagar.
Srinagar Airport is 19 km from NIT Srinagar.
Srinagar Bus Stand is 10 km from NIT Srinagar.
NIT Srinagar has 8 hostels: Indus, Chenab, Mansar, Mansbal, Jhelum Extension, Jhelum, Tawi, and PG Hostel.
Jhelum Hostel is for 4th year students with single rooms allotted based on CGPA.
Remaining 4th year students are placed in Tawi Hostel.
Other year students are allotted hostels randomly.
Each hostel has its own separate mess.
Each hostel has separate laundry facilities. Laundry bill is included in the fee structure.

mess.cost: Rs 21,000 mess advance per semester (adjustable) + Rs 1,500 BHM Contribution
mess.assignment: Each hostel has its own separate mess.

monday.breakfast: Poha + Aloo Bhujia + Lemon + Tea/Salt Tea OR Kashmiri Roti(2) + Butter + Tea
monday.lunch: Mix Dal + Aloo Bhurji + Curd + Roti + Rice
monday.dinner: Veg: Matar Paneer + Dal Tadka. Non-veg: Chicken Curry. Roti + Rice

tuesday.breakfast: Gobhi Paratha(2)/Kashmiri Roti(2) + Butter + Tea + Sauce + Banana
tuesday.lunch: Rajma + Tomato Onion Shimla Mirchi Matar Sabji + Curd + Roti/Dhaniya Roti + Rice
tuesday.dinner: Kadhi Pakoda + Mix Veg Sabji + Onion Salad + Roti + Rice + Mirchi + Kheer

wednesday.lunch: Rice + Roti + Aloo Gobhi + Chana Dal
wednesday.dinner: Veg: Shahi Paneer + Mix Dal + Roti + Rice. Non-veg: Chicken Biryani + Green Chutney + Onion Salad

thursday.breakfast: Chole + Poori(4)/Kashmiri Roti(2) + Butter + Tea + Banana(2)
thursday.lunch: Aloo Matar Sabji + Masala Chole + Roti + Curd + Rice
thursday.dinner: Tomato Nutry + Rajma + Roti/Dhaniya Roti + Rice + Papad(1) + Halwa

friday.breakfast: Methi Paratha(2)/Kashmiri Roti(2) + Butter + Milk + Tea + Sauce
friday.lunch: Dal Tadka + Mix Veg + Rice + Roti + Pickle
friday.dinner: Veg: Kadhai Paneer + Arhar Dal. Non-veg: Butter Chicken. Roti + Rice

saturday.lunch: Rajma + Aloo Baigan Bharta + Roti/Dhaniya Roti + Rice
saturday.dinner: Rice + Roti + Bhindi Masala + Dal Tadka

sunday.dinner: Aloo Zeera + Chana Dal + Roti + Rice + Pickle + Sewaiyan

mess.notes: Kashmiri Roti is a daily breakfast option (unique to NIT Srinagar). Non-veg chicken available on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday dinners. Butter Chicken on Friday. Desserts: Kheer on Tuesday, Halwa on Thursday, Sewaiyan on Sunday.
mess.cuisine: North Indian and Kashmiri cuisine. Kashmiri Roti and Salt Tea as daily breakfast staples. Both veg and non-veg dinner options on Mon/Wed/Fri.

facts: WiFi and LAN available in hostel.
Only postpaid SIM works. Prepaid SIMs do not work.
5G and 4G mobile connectivity available.
75% attendance is mandatory at NIT Srinagar.
April/May: Rang-e-Chinnar (cultural fest).
September/October: Techvaganza (tech fest).
Separate laundry for each hostel.
Laundry bill is included in the fee structure.
No elections are conducted at NIT Srinagar.
Badminton, Football, Cricket, Volleyball, Tennis, Table Tennis, and Chess are available.
5 canteens on campus.
Operating hours: 10 AM to 11:30 PM / 12 AM.
6 shops are available on campus.
Fines range from Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000.
Offences: Inappropriate behavior, Ragging, Smoking/Drinking on premises, Fights, Damaging equipment.
Boys and girls have separate gym facilities.
Fee must be paid separately (not included in the fee structure).
Medical unit available on campus.
Medicines provided free of cost.

restaurants.notes: Other Kashmir restaurants also available nearby.

facts: Winter: December-February.
Spring: March-April.
Summer: May-August.
Rainy: June-August.
Autumn: September-November.

academics.class_timings: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:20 PM
